Emily starts with [initial_dog_count] dogs at her rescue center. On [day_of_week_1], she received [number_of_puppies] puppies from [location_1]. The next day, on [day_of_week_2], a family brought in [number_of_strays] stray dog they had found near [location_2]. These additions increased the total number of dogs in the center. By [day_of_week_3], [number_of_families] families adopted [number_of_dogs_per_family] dogs each, which significantly reduced the population of the rescue center.

***

After accounting for all the changes, the current number of dogs in Emily's rescue center is [final_dog_count]. This number is calculated by starting with [initial_dog_count], adding [number_of_puppies] and [number_of_strays], then subtracting the total number of dogs adopted, which is [total_dogs_adopted]. The final total reflects the current state of the rescue center as of [current_date].
